title: The Village Square
lines: The once-familiar village square is now a labyrinth of barricades and abandoned cars. You can hear the groans of the undead echoing off the buildings.
To the north, the neon sign of a general store flickers fitfully. To the south, a large tunnel entrance marks the descent into the sewers.
The air is thick with the smell of smoke and fear. You must move quickly.

options.desc: 3. Attempt to help a huddle of survivors
4. Hike toward the lights of the local rugby pitch
